references.hebrew: וַיִּקְרָ֛א אֶת־שֵֽׁם־הַמָּק֥וֹם הַה֖וּא בֵּֽית־אֵ֑ל וְאוּלָ֛ם ל֥וּז שֵׁם־הָעִ֖יר לָרִאשֹׁנָֽה׃
references.english: He named that site Bethel;fBethel I.e., “house of God.” but previously the name of the city had been Luz.

references.hebrew: וְֽהָלְכ֞וּ עַמִּ֣ים רַבִּ֗ים וְאָֽמְרוּ֙ לְכ֣וּ ׀ וְנַעֲלֶ֣ה אֶל־הַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה אֶל־בֵּית֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יַעֲקֹ֔ב וְיֹרֵ֙נוּ֙ מִדְּרָכָ֔יו וְנֵלְכָ֖ה בְּאֹרְחֹתָ֑יו כִּ֤י מִצִּיּוֹן֙ תֵּצֵ֣א תוֹרָ֔ה וּדְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה מִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
references.english:
And the many peoples shall go and say:
“Come,
Let us go up to the Mount of GOD,
To the House of the God of Jacob;
That we may be instructed in God’s ways,
And that we may walk in God’s paths.”
For instruction shall come forthainstruction shall come forth I.e., oracles will be obtainable. from Zion,
The word of GOD from Jerusalem.
references.matched_snippet: דכתיב והלכו עמים רבים ואמרו לכו

references.hebrew: וַיִּקְרָ֧א אַבְרָהָ֛ם שֵֽׁם־הַמָּק֥וֹם הַה֖וּא יְהֹוָ֣ה <small>׀</small> יִרְאֶ֑ה אֲשֶׁר֙ יֵאָמֵ֣ר הַיּ֔וֹם בְּהַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה יֵרָאֶֽה׃
references.english: And Abraham named that site Adonai-yireh,dAdonai-yireh I.e., “GOD will see” or “GOD takes care”; cf. v. 8. whence the present saying, “On GOD’s mount there is vision.”eOn GOD’s mount there is vision Heb. be-har y-h-w-h yeraʼeh. Or “…there is contact”; cf. note at 12.7.
references.matched_snippet: יאמר היום בהר ה יראה ולא כיצחק

references.hebrew: וַיֵּצֵ֥א יִצְחָ֛ק לָשׂ֥וּחַ בַּשָּׂדֶ֖ה לִפְנ֣וֹת עָ֑רֶב וַיִּשָּׂ֤א עֵינָיו֙ וַיַּ֔רְא וְהִנֵּ֥ה גְמַלִּ֖ים בָּאִֽים׃
references.english: And Isaac went out walkinggwalking Meaning of Heb. lasuaḥ uncertain; in contrast to others “to meditate.” in the field toward evening and, looking up, he saw camels approaching.
references.matched_snippet: שכתוב בו שדה שנאמר ויצא יצחק לשוח

references.hebrew: וְ֠נִקְבְּצ֠וּ בְּנֵֽי־יְהוּדָ֤ה וּבְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ יַחְדָּ֔ו וְשָׂמ֥וּ לָהֶ֛ם רֹ֥אשׁ אֶחָ֖ד וְעָל֣וּ מִן־הָאָ֑רֶץ כִּ֥י גָד֖וֹל י֥וֹם יִזְרְעֶֽאל׃
references.english: The people of Judah and the people of Israel shall assemble together and appoint one head over them; and they shall rise from the groundcfrom the ground Meaning, perhaps, “from their wretched condition,” or “to ascendancy over the land.”—for marvelous shall be the day of Jezreel!dthe day of Jezreel I.e., the day when the name Jezreel will convey a promise (2.23–25) instead of a threat (1.4–5).
references.matched_snippet: ישראל יחדו ושמו להם ראש אחד ועלו מן

references.hebrew: וַיִּקְרָ֨א אֱלֹהִ֤ים ׀ לָאוֹר֙ י֔וֹם וְלַחֹ֖שֶׁךְ קָ֣רָא לָ֑יְלָה וַֽיְהִי־עֶ֥רֶב וַֽיְהִי־בֹ֖קֶר י֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃ {פ}
references.english: God called the light Day—and called the darkness Night. And there was evening and there was morning, a first day.ca first day In contrast to others “one day.”
references.matched_snippet: ויהי בקר יום אחד &star יתום ששחטו עליו

references.hebrew: דַּבְּר֗וּ אֶֽל־כׇּל־עֲדַ֤ת יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר בֶּעָשֹׂ֖ר לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַזֶּ֑ה וְיִקְח֣וּ לָהֶ֗ם אִ֛ישׁ שֶׂ֥ה לְבֵית־אָבֹ֖ת שֶׂ֥ה לַבָּֽיִת׃
references.english: Speak to the whole community of Israelawhole community of Israel Or the leadership, on everyone’s behalf; cf. v. 21. and say that on the tenth of this month each family shall take for itself a lamb,blamb Or “kid.” Heb. seh means either “sheep” or “goat”; cf. v. 5. a lamb to a household.
references.matched_snippet: רבי זירא שה לבית מכל מקום &star תנו רבנן שה לבית
